guest_first_name.description: The guest's first name. Find it in the email subject after 'Message sent to' or in the email body after 'A scheduled message was sent to'.

property_name.description: The full property listing nickname, verbatim from the email body. Find it after 'who stayed at' and before 'from'. Example: 'Spacious 3BR Near UTSA & Six Flags – Sleeps 10'.

property_full_address.description: The full street address of the property, derived from the property mapping table in the user message. Example: '214 Adelaide Oaks, San Antonio, TX 78249'. If the listing nickname is not in the mapping table, return the empty string.

property_folder_name.description: The ClickUp folder name for this property, derived from the property mapping table in the user message. This is the short street name only (e.g., 'Adelaide Oaks'), not the full address. If the listing nickname is not in the mapping table, return the empty string.

checkout_date_iso.description: The date the guest checked out, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Find it in the email body after 'to' in the phrase 'from [date] to [date]'. Use year 2026 unless the email explicitly indicates otherwise.

checkout_plus_12_days_iso.description: The checkout date plus exactly 12 calendar days, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Calculate carefully, handling month and year boundaries correctly (e.g., May 25 + 12 days = June 6; Dec 28 + 12 days = January 9 of the following year).
